description: Clark-Y UIUC drag polar compared against NACA 2412 as the closest supported proxy at Reynolds ~6.1e4

source.name: UIUC Low-Speed Airfoil Tests Vol. 3
source.notes: Reference CSV is copied from the DRG table. Airfoil Tools currently supports NACA 4-digit profiles only, so this case intentionally benchmarks how well a NACA 2412 proxy tracks Clark-Y data.
